subcodes.first_line: O cherished handmaiden of God! Think not that thou art not in the sanctuary with the holy leaves; night and day thou art remembered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی کمان منما که در حرم نزد ورقات مقدسه نیستی شب و روز بذکر تو
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @consolation and comfort, @naming of children; of individuals
